action.reasoning: Observation: Error 'Expected size 16 but got size 64' - direction tensor is (B, 4) one-hot encoded by SB3, not (B,) integer. Analysis: SB3 preprocesses Discrete spaces as one-hot vectors. So direction comes in as (B, 4) float tensor. I need to use argmax to get the index for embedding, or use a linear layer directly on the one-hot. Decision: Use argmax to convert one-hot back to index for embedding, or simply use a linear layer on the 4-dim one-hot vector.
